mapper.sql: coalesce( case when cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'requestId' ~ '[^[:space:]]' then cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'requestId' end, case when cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'requestID' ~ '[^[:space:]]' then cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'requestID' end, case when cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'id' ~ '[^[:space:]]' then cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'id' end, case when cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'permissionId' ~ '[^[:space:]]' then cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'permissionId' end, case when cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'questionId' ~ '[^[:space:]]' then cast(e.payload_json as jsonb) ->> 'questionId' end, 'current')

case when regexp_like(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"requestId"\s*:\s*"[^"]*[^"\s][^"]*"') then regexp_replace(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"requestId"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)".*', '\1') when regexp_like(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"requestID"\s*:\s*"[^"]*[^"\s][^"]*"') then regexp_replace(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"requestID"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)".*', '\1') when regexp_like(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"id"\s*:\s*"[^"]*[^"\s][^"]*"') then regexp_replace(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"id"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)".*', '\1') when regexp_like(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"permissionId"\s*:\s*"[^"]*[^"\s][^"]*"') then regexp_replace(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"permissionId"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)".*', '\1') when regexp_like(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"questionId"\s*:\s*"[^"]*[^"\s][^"]*"') then regexp_replace(cast(e.payload_json as varchar), '^\s*[{](?:\s*"[^"]+"\s*:\s*"[^"]*"\s*,)*\s*"questionId"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)".*', '\1') else 'current' end
mapper.select:
with visible_sessions as ( select s.session_id from sessions s where s.status = 'ACTIVE' and s.source_type != 'SIDE_QUESTION' and ( s.created_by_user_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from runs visible_runs where visible_runs.session_id = s.session_id and visible_runs.triggered_by_user_id = #{userId} ) or exists ( select 1 from session_messages visible_messages where visible_messages.session_id = s.session_id and visible_messages.sender_user_id = #{userId} ) ) ), ranked_runs as ( select r.id, r.session_id, r.run_id, r.status, r.updated_at, row_number() over ( partition by r.session_id order by r.updated_at desc, r.id desc ) as run_rank from runs r join visible_sessions vs on vs.session_id = r.session_id where r.status in ('PENDING', 'RUNNING', 'CANCELLING') ), active_runs as ( select id, session_id, run_id, status, updated_at from ranked_runs where run_rank = 1 ),
attention_events as ( select e.run_id, e.event_id, e.seq, e.type, e.occurred_at, case when e.type in ('question.asked', 'question.replied', 'question.rejected') then 'QUESTION' else 'PERMISSION' end as attention, as request_id from run_events e join active_runs ar on ar.run_id = e.run_id where e.type in ( 'question.asked', 'question.replied', 'question.rejected', 'permission.asked', 'permission.replied') ), latest_unresolved_attention_events as ( select asked.run_id, asked.event_id, asked.attention, asked.occurred_at, row_number() over ( partition by asked.run_id order by asked.seq desc ) as event_rank from attention_events asked where asked.type in ('question.asked', 'permission.asked') and not exists ( select 1 from attention_events replied where replied.run_id = asked.run_id and replied.request_id = asked.request_id and ( (asked.attention = 'QUESTION' and replied.type in ('question.replied', 'question.rejected')) or (asked.attention = 'PERMISSION' and replied.type = 'permission.replied') ) and replied.seq > asked.seq ) ) select ar.session_id, ar.run_id, ar.status as run_status, qe.attention as attention, qe.event_id as attention_event_id, qe.occurred_at as attention_at, ar.updated_at from active_runs ar left join latest_unresolved_attention_events qe on qe.run_id = ar.run_id and qe.event_rank = 1 order by ar.updated_at desc, ar.id desc
